welcome.ctaSubtext: Takes about 3 minutes to set up
welcome.nativeTitle: Plot your rebrand in one place
welcome.nativeDescription: Boards, structures, and tracking — all in one workspace.

desire.title: Pick your plot
desire.subtitle: Life · Home · Office · Mood — no wrong door

makeYours.title: Choose your acrylics
makeYours.subtitle: Board colors, layouts, and clippings that feel like you

name.title: First things first — what do we call you in here?
name.saveError: Could not save your name. Check your connection and try again.

focusCategories.title: What are you plotting?
focusCategories.subtitle: Pick up to three — these become your focus boards.

primaryIntent.title: What are you setting up?
primaryIntent.subtitle: You can mix everything later — this just sets your starting point.

life_rebranding.title: Life plotting & vision boards
life_rebranding.description: Identity, goals, and the signature four-board vision system.

home_organization.title: Home organization
home_organization.description: Your household command center — schedules, chores, and zones.

office_work.title: Office & projects
office_work.description: Kanban, timelines, OKRs — systems for people who plan in color.

moodboarding.title: Moodboarding
moodboarding.description: Aesthetic grids, interiors, travel — plot the vibe first.

homeFocus.title: What's your home focus?
homeFocus.subtitle: Pick the area you want your starter boards built around.

officePlanning.title: Choose your planning system
officePlanning.subtitle: Trusted by PMs, planners, and lean teams — pick your primary board mode.

kanban.title: Kanban
kanban.description: Visual flow with WIP-friendly columns — from software to factory floor.

gantt.title: Gantt timeline
gantt.description: Tasks across time with phases, dependencies, and milestones.

okrs.title: OKRs
okrs.description: Objectives and measurable key results — team-ready framing.

five_s.title: 5S workplace
five_s.description: Sort, set, shine, standardize, sustain — lean discipline.

moodboardFocus.title: What's your moodboard for?
moodboardFocus.subtitle: We'll open gallery-style boards tuned to this vibe.

focusDetails.subtitle: We'll shape your starter boards around this.
focusDetails.fallbackMessage: Go back and pick a focus area to unlock this step.
focusDetails.customPlaceholder: e.g., Soft life era, new career chapter

currentFriction.title: What's slowing the rebrand down?
currentFriction.subtitle: Name it once so we can build your boards around it.
currentFriction.placeholder: The thing you keep working around…

toolPreference.title: What do you want within reach on day one?
toolPreference.subtitle: Pick what feels true — you can add more once you're inside.

workspaceTemplate.title: Choose your first board layout
workspaceTemplate.subtitle: Like picking acrylic sheets off the wall — you can rearrange anytime.

subtitleByIntent.life_rebranding: The signature vision boards + plan — pick the four-board vibe you want.
subtitleByIntent.home_organization: Household boards with checklists and visual zones.
subtitleByIntent.moodboarding: Gallery-forward boards for inspo and creative direction.

four-board-rebrand.name: Three Focus Boards and The Plan
four-board-rebrand.description: Three focus boards and one plan board — the signature four-board plot.

soft-life-reset.name: Glow, Home & Peace
soft-life-reset.description: Beauty, environment, and calm rituals with a plan board.

career-girl.name: Ambition & Wealth
career-girl.description: Career vision, money goals, and confidence with a plan board.

minimal-plan.name: One Vision + Plan
minimal-plan.description: One hero vision board and a dedicated plan board.

home-plan-routines.name: Home Plan & Routines
home-plan-routines.description: Weekly rhythms, zones, and family flow.

home-chores-cleaning.name: Chores & Cleaning
home-chores-cleaning.description: Chore charts, supplies, and reset zones.

home-seasonal-reset.name: Seasonal Reset
home-seasonal-reset.description: Holiday, declutter, and seasonal home projects.

office-five-s.name: 5S Workplace
office-five-s.description: Lean floor discipline — Sort through Sustain.

guide.title: Choose a guide
guide.subtitle: An AI companion for questions while you rebrand.

attribution.title: How'd you find us?
attribution.subtitle: This just helps us understand how people find us.

intensity.title: How intense is your plan?

titleByIntent.moodboarding: How often do you want to plot?

intensity.subtitle: Set your pace and optional nudges.
intensity.notificationsQuestion: Want nudges back to your boards when you drift?
intensity.notificationsHint: Quiet reminders to your workspace — only if you opt in.
intensity.customizeInSettings: You can change this anytime in Settings.

light.title: Light
light.description: A soft cadence with optional daily reminders.

consistent.title: Consistent
consistent.tagline: For girls who show up daily.
consistent.description: Steadier check-ins with up to 2 daily reminders, if selected.

lockedIn.title: Locked In
lockedIn.description: High-touch rhythm with up to 3 daily reminders, if selected.

tracking.title: Help us improve Palette Plotting (optional)
tracking.body: Palette Plotting uses app activity data to measure ad performance and improve experience. Will you help us improve Palette Plotting?

email.title: Save your plot
email.subtitle: Create your account to lock in your rebrand workspace. Everything saves to this email.
email.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
email.needFirstName: We need your first name from earlier in setup.
email.passwordLength: Please enter a password with at least 8 characters
email.acceptTerms: Please accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
email.subscriptionError: Could not open subscription options. Try again in a moment.
email.signOutToChangeEmail: Sign out to use a different address.
email.signOutToChangeEmailToast: Sign out first to use a different email address.
email.signOutFailed: Could not sign out. Try again.
email.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Enter your email and password again.
email.emailMarketingConsent: Send me rebrand tips and updates. By checking this box, you consent to marketing communications. You can opt out anytime.

plotSynthesis.title: You're cleared for the studio.
plotSynthesis.subtitle: Here's what we set up from what you told us — yours once you subscribe.

items.workspace: Your plotting workspace, colored and laid out your way.
items.boards: Daily board review and plan steps.
items.tracking: Milestones and progress on your journey tab.

plotLoading.title: Preparing your room…
plotLoading.subtitle: Laying out boards, color, and your first plot.
plotLoading.hint: You're not starting from zero — something is already being built for you.

row1.quote: Finally feels like my moodboard came to life.

row1.author: Riley T.

row1.quote: The aesthetic + plan combo is exactly what I needed.
row1.author: Casey L.

row1.quote: My rebrand actually looks like me now.
row1.author: Morgan P.

row2.quote: Seeing it all in one place changed how I show up.
row2.author: Dev S.

row2.quote: Reminders on my plotted goals keep me honest.
row2.author: Avery K.

row2.quote: Small daily wins on the plan board add up fast.
row2.author: Quinn R.

row2.quote: I open this more than any other app on my phone.
